title: 5 Stocks With Recent Dividend Hike for a Stable Portfolio
text: Investors should remain cautious and stay invested in dividend-paying stocks to safeguard their portfolios. These are: LRCX, INTU, CABO, LYB and UCBI.

title: 7 Undervalued Stocks That Are Screaming Buys Right Now
text: The market's summertime rally is losing momentum, but there still are undervalued stocks out there if you look. The rally's short-term bullishness benefited traders, while investors who sat out of markets missed out.

title: LyondellBasell Remains An Attractive High Yield Buy, Here's Why
text: LyondellBasell is a high-quality chemical company that's benefiting from strong end market tailwinds. The company has a solid balance sheet and is returning a lot of capital to shareholders via dividends and share repurchases.

title: LyondellBasell: New Era For Dividends, Despite Lacking Communication
text: LyondellBasell declared their first ever special dividend during the second quarter of 2022, thereby in my eyes, marking a new era for dividends. If continued in future years, this could see shareholders taking home a very high 10%+ dividend yield, although oddly, management seemingly glossed over this very exciting development.

title: 7 Deep Value Stocks for Income and High Total Returns
text: Investors have fewer deep value stocks to pick from after the latest rally. Retail investors had enough of the bear market by late June when the S&P 500 bottomed at below 3700.

title: LyondellBasell: Don't Ignore This Bullish Bottom
text: LyondellBasell reported a Q2 card demonstrating ongoing macro headwinds impacting its revenue growth cadence. However, its margins remained resilient. Notwithstanding, LYB could continue to be impacted by cost headwinds impinging on its profitability. Also, the economic downturn could likely adversely affect demand conditions.
